name: DW · Fact Purchase Order Line
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS purchase_order_line_id,
    ((gs - 1) / 3) + 1                                                          AS purchase_order_id, -- FK, 3 lines/PO
    ((gs - 1) % 3) + 1                                                          AS line_number,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('POLPROD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 200)    AS product_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('POLQTY'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 500)     AS quantity_ordered,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('POLCOST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 20000)/100.0 + 5)::numeric, 2) AS unit_cost
FROM generate_series(1, 6000) AS gs
